name: Pearson Unlimited Inc a Firefly Agency
description_short: Financial advisor firm in Decatur, GA operating as part of Firefly Agency network. Limited publicly available information about specific services offered.
description_long:
Pearson Unlimited Inc operates as a Firefly Agency affiliate, positioned as a financial advisors firm based in Decatur, Georgia. The company is listed in the Georgia Business Journal directory under Financial Advisors and Financial & Insurance Services categories, suggesting a broader financial services focus than credit repair alone.

Based on available directory information, the company operates from 201 W Ponce de Leon Ave Unit 119 in Decatur and can be reached at 404-737-3607. Their website (pearsonunlimitedinc.com) exists but specific service details are not accessible through the provided directory listing.

The 'Firefly Agency' designation suggests the company may be part of a larger network or franchise operation, though this relationship and its implications are not detailed in available public information. The company appears to target Georgia consumers seeking financial advisory services, though the exact scope of offerings—whether credit repair, wealth management, insurance, or general financial planning—cannot be definitively determined from the directory listing alone.

A critical limitation is that the directory entry provides minimal substantive information about actual services, credentials, regulatory status, or client reviews. Consumers should directly contact the company or visit their full website to understand their specific offerings, licensing, and whether they are registered with appropriate financial regulatory bodies.
